title: ALEX_CHIKNA
description: A confident and energetic young male voice with a fast-paced, enthusiastic delivery. This voice is well-suited for social media content, sports commentary, and high-energy promotional announcements.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: What's up WWE Universe! Breaking news: Roman Reigns just dropped a bombshell on social media! The Tribal Chief hints at a potential dream match at SummerSlam, and fans are going crazy! Could this be the biggest match of the year? Drop your predictions below, and don't forget to smash that like button!

default_text: What's up WWE Universe! Breaking news: Roman Reigns just dropped a bombshell on social media! The Tribal Chief hints at a potential dream match at SummerSlam, and fans are going crazy! Could this be the biggest match of the year? Drop your predictions below, and don't forget to smash that like button!

title: Energetic Male
description: A youthful and energetic male voice with a clear, professional American accent. The tone is dynamic and enthusiastic, well-suited for high-energy announcements and promotional content.

samples.title: Intro
samples.text: Hey there! After months of intensive development, Fish Audio 1.5 has just launched with major improvements to expressiveness, stability, and cross-language capabilities.

samples.title: Sales
samples.text: Our AI voices can help you scale your business globally while maintaining that personal touch, whether it's for training videos, customer support, or professional voice-overs.

title: ELITE
description: A confident and energetic young male voice with a crisp, professional tone, well-suited for sports commentary or engaging narrations.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: The fourth quarter intensity was electric. Players battling through contact, coaches challenging calls from the sidelines. But it wasn't just about the scoreboard - it was about respect on the court. The officials' inconsistency had everyone talking, from fans to analysts.

default_text: The fourth quarter intensity was electric. Players battling through contact, coaches challenging calls from the sidelines. But it wasn't just about the scoreboard - it was about respect on the court. The officials' inconsistency had everyone talking, from fans to analysts.

title: ALLE
description: A young female voice with an energetic and friendly tone, ideal for social media content and product reviews. The voice is clear, expressive, and maintains a high-paced, conversational flow.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Okay, you guys literally need to see this new foundation brush I found. It's so incredibly soft and blends everything like butter. The best part? It's normally $45 but right now it's on sale for $28 with a free setting spray. Like, such an amazing deal!

default_text: Okay, you guys literally need to see this new foundation brush I found. It's so incredibly soft and blends everything like butter. The best part? It's normally $45 but right now it's on sale for $28 with a free setting spray. Like, such an amazing deal!

title: horror
description: A deep and serious middle-aged male voice with a calm, mysterious tone. Well-suited for suspenseful narration, documentaries, or cinematic storytelling.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: During the winter of 1985, residents of a small Maine town reported seeing shadowy figures standing motionless in their yards at night. The entities would vanish when approached, leaving only deep footprints in the snow. Despite multiple witnesses, no explanation was ever found.

default_text: During the winter of 1985, residents of a small Maine town reported seeing shadowy figures standing motionless in their yards at night. The entities would vanish when approached, leaving only deep footprints in the snow. Despite multiple witnesses, no explanation was ever found.

title: Friendly Women
description: A bright and energetic female voice with a youthful, professional tone. Her delivery is clear and enthusiastic, making it highly engaging for a variety of media.

samples.title: Intro
samples.text: Hey there, fabulous AI enthusiasts! As Anonymous Sparkle on TTS-Arena, I'm thrilled to sparkle through your speakers and showcase what text-to-speech can really do.

samples.title: Narrative
samples.text: The city is a canvas, and its streets are the gallery. This is where street art thrives, a vibrant expression of urban culture that transcends the boundaries of traditional art forms.

title: Donald J. Trump(Noise reduction)
description: A confident and authoritative male voice with a distinctive New York accent, characterized by an emphatic and persuasive tone. This voice sounds like an older man with a slightly raspy quality and a high level of energy.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Folks, nobody knows noise better than me, believe me. These other companies, they're terrible, just terrible with noise. But we have the best technology, the absolute best. We're going to make everything so quiet, so beautiful, you won't believe it.

default_text: Folks, nobody knows noise better than me, believe me. These other companies, they're terrible, just terrible with noise. But we have the best technology, the absolute best. We're going to make everything so quiet, so beautiful, you won't believe it.

title: Voice DL

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Think about the last time someone tried to rush you into a decision, pushing for an immediate response. But what if I told you that your greatest power lies in the pause? That calculated moment of stillness where you reclaim control, where wisdom lives in the space between reaction and response.

default_text: Think about the last time someone tried to rush you into a decision, pushing for an immediate response. But what if I told you that your greatest power lies in the pause? That calculated moment of stillness where you reclaim control, where wisdom lives in the space between reaction and response.

title: Hatsune Miku (Text To Speech)
description: A vibrant and cheerful young male voice with an energetic, melodic tone. Its high energy and friendly delivery make it well-suited for upbeat characters or digital personalities.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Hello everyone! Let's create wonderful music together! When my voice joins with your hearts, we can make dreams come true through digital harmony. I'll keep singing for you, bringing smiles across the world with every note. ♪

default_text: Hello everyone! Let's create wonderful music together! When my voice joins with your hearts, we can make dreams come true through digital harmony. I'll keep singing for you, bringing smiles across the world with every note. ♪

title: BOOK RECORD REGULAR
description: A mature, deep male voice with a distinctively raspy and gravelly quality that suggests wisdom and gravitas. Its slow, measured delivery creates a calm and authoritative presence perfect for cinematic narration or dramatic storytelling.

samples.title: Default Sample
samples.text: Sometimes the greatest strength lies in walking away. Peace doesn't always need defending, and wisdom doesn't always need explaining. The most powerful moments are often found in the spaces between words, where understanding speaks louder than speech.

default_text: Sometimes the greatest strength lies in walking away. Peace doesn't always need defending, and wisdom doesn't always need explaining. The most powerful moments are often found in the spaces between words, where understanding speaks louder than speech.
